steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says history 'cannot remain the dominion only of academics' and should not be 'left to historians alone.' The blank describes history's relationship to democracy — something so important it must not be left to specialists.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — respectable: being respectable gives no reason to involve non-specialists. ✗
  • Choice B — complex: complexity is a reason to leave something to specialists, not the opposite. ✗
  • Choice C — accessible: accessible describes availability, not importance — it doesn't explain why history can't be left to academics. ✗
  • Choice D — critical: critical means essential or vital — if history is critical to democracy, it is too important to confine to specialists. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
